title: Whimscape x Cobblemon
description: An unofficial add-on pack that brings the style of Whimscape to the Cobblemon mod
body:
![Whimscape x Cobblemon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe4103e267ca67e13c6d60cd3c274617cf994aa1.png)

### Bring the Whimscape style to your Cobblemon world. ### 

This recourse pack adds new texture to all blocks, new 3D models and items, while mainting the iconic visuals.

**Updated to Cobblemon 1.6: The Record Catch Update**

**All Blocks:** </br>
All Ores, PC, Healing Machine, Pasture block, Restoration Tank, Fossil Analyzer, Data Monitor, Display Case, Relic Coin Sack, Relic Coin Pouch, Tumblestone blocks, Pots, Gilded Chests and All Apricorn wood set.

**Items:** </br>
All items have machting texture now. Fishing rods, Sherds, Automation Armour Trim, Automation Template, Tumblestones, Fossils, Relic Coin, Medicine, Evolution items, Held items, Apricorn and Sprouts.

**Disclosure:** </br>
I do not intent changing any of the pokeballs, maybe giving them a outline to fit better overall, like I did with the apricorns, they are just too iconic to be mess with.

![blocks preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af13b9e9ae2a5389cef3fa13b09301d5e18514b3.png)

[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0221659674db6d9cf193d45580de83d3db6795d.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape "Get Whimscape here")
[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d8a39b723eb011bd4fa8deee6880702f7d7e7b3.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape-exploration "Exploration add-on")
